---
title: Skip-to-content link (custom page layout)
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      ensureHtmlElements:
        -
          # skip link is the first element of the body
          - 'body > a#quarto-skip-link:first-child[href="#quarto-document-content"]'
          # custom layouts have no <main>; the layout container gets the id
          - 'div.page-layout-custom#quarto-document-content[tabindex="-1"]'
        - []
---

Standalone documents with `page-layout: custom` have no `<main>` element;
the skip link should target the custom layout container instead
(<https://github.com/quarto-dev/quarto-cli/issues/14684>).

Some custom content.
